title: euphrasia salisburgensis subsp. pulchra
intro: Euphrasia salisburgensis subsp. pulchra is a subspecies of the Euphrasia genus, commonly referred to as a type of eye-bright, a flowering plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve vision. The health benefits of Euphrasia salisburgensis subsp. pulchra include its potential to alleviate symptoms of dry eye, conjunctivitis, and other eye conditions, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and infusions, which are often used to treat eye problems and support overall eye health.
